description: GHG Emissions Analysis Dashboard - Analyzes greenhouse gas emissions data by location, state, county, and population

datasets.name: Location Data
datasets.query:
select 
    latitude,
    longitude,
    `GHG emissions mtons CO2e` as emissions

from emissions.default.emissions_data

datasets.name: Emissions per Person
datasets.purpose: Calculate per capita emissions by county
datasets.query:
select
    county_state_name,
    population,
    cast(REPLACE(`GHG emissions mtons CO2e`, ',', '') as double) / NULLIF(cast(population as double), 0) as EmissionsPerPerson
from emissions.default.emissions_data
order by emissionsperperson desc
datasets.notes: Handles comma-separated numbers and division by zero

datasets.name: Emissions Per State
datasets.query:
select
  state_abbr,
  SUM(cast(REPLACE(`GHG emissions mtons CO2e`, ',', '') as double)) as TotalEmissionByState
from
  emissions.default.emissions_data
group by
  state_abbr
order by
  TotalEmissionByState desc
  limit 10

datasets.name: County Shaming
datasets.purpose: Identify counties with highest total emissions (top 10)
datasets.query:
select county_state_name,
        population,
        cast(
            replace(`GHG emissions mtons CO2e`, ',', '') as double
        ) as Total_Emissions
        from emissions.default.emissions_data

order by Total_Emissions desc
limit 10

visualizations.description: Point map showing emissions by latitude/longitude
Per capita emissions comparison across counties
